title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude is used by Williams F1 Team to visualize cognitive patterns and decision-making processes of drivers and pit crew during races. The system transforms biometric and performance data into visual outputs displayed on team apparel and garage displays, debuting at Monaco.
